australian_relation: State Library Victoria public article discussing an Australian Christmas ghost story with an explicit Melbourne setting.
coordinate_evidence_note: State Library Victoria page says Crowther's Christmas ghost begins at Spencer Street before a journey from Melbourne; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Southern Cross Station / former Spencer Street Station result.
evidence_summary: State Library Victoria discusses Edward Dyson's Australian Christmas ghost-story setting and says Crowther's Christmas ghost begins with Crowther throwing his luggage at a porter at Spencer Street before embarking on a hot and dusty journey from Melbourne to his hometown and the haunts of his youth.
publication_or_organisation: A ghost story for Christmas; State Library Victoria
